components.buttons: Sharp edges, flat, highly saturated primary background, bright white text, hover state slightly darker with increased ring. data-testid required.
components.cards: Cardless or Grid Border style. 1px border on right/bottom to form a continuous grid. No soft shadows. Solid background matching surface.
components.navigation: Sticky left sidebar or fixed top nav. Solid surface color (no glassmorphism to avoid data distraction). Primary color for active state.
components.status_indicators: Traffic light colors (Green, Amber, Red). Use soft glow (drop-shadow) and solid dots. No neon borders.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Sharp borders, clear focus ring with primary color (ring-[#FF5C00]).

images.description: Dark sports car parked in illuminated garage setting - use for auth screens or hero sections.
Man washing car in a dimly lit garage - use for worker portal or service marketing page.
Man waxing a car - use as placeholder for before/after evidence photos.
Close up rear view mirror - use as detail evidence placeholder.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use strict dark mode. The entire visual language relies on dark mode contrast, do not implement a light mode alternative.
Build the dashboard using a 'Control Room' grid: dense, gap-4, precise.
Use Shadcn UI but override corner radii to 0 or 2px max (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`) for a sharp industrial look.
Use pure white for primary text against the dark backgrounds.
Use the 'Grid Borders' layout pattern for dashboard widgets: border-collapse style with 1px border-white/10 on right and bottom of cells to look technical.
Evidence thumbnails should use aspect-video and object-cover with a subtle border.
Mandatory: Add `data-testid` to all buttons, links, inputs, and interactive elements for testing.
Typography: Import and use 'Barlow Condensed' for headings/metrics and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text from Google Fonts.
